name: Brian & Co Product Preservation and Upgrade Entitlement Rules
permanentRules: la carte buyers keep the exact features, access, and rights purchased.
Bug fixes, security fixes, compatibility fixes, and legal/safety-required corrections are not treated as paid feature removals.
New premium capabilities may be member-included or offered as optional paid  la carte upgrades.
Do not silently charge  la carte buyers for new capabilities.
Show upgrade opportunities in Brian & Co tone without removing what they already own.
Membership users receive feature expansion according to tier, approval mode, and product rules.
Live Shopify changes remain draft/pending founder approval until explicitly approved.
customerMessageTemplate: You still keep everything you already purchased. A new optional capability is available if you would like deeper automation, intelligence, or continuity support.
